hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''))" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && ~/.nvm/versions/node/v22.13.0/bin/node /home/vincent-chpd/dev/personal/stock-market-app/node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f" --ignore-unknown; } 2>/dev/null || true
